social.name: Emmanuel Macron
social.text:
Très heureux de retrouver l’Arménie.

Merci pour cet accueil !

Avec la Communauté politique européenne demain, nous continuerons de bâtir une Europe plus souveraine. Puis avec mon ami le Premier ministre Nikol Pachinian nous scellerons un partenariat stratégique entre nos pays.

social.name: Nicolas Maduro
social.text: Perseverar es sostener el bien, cuidar la Paz, defender la verdad y seguir en oración. ¡Fe y unión!

social.name: Recep Erdogan
social.text: CEV Zeren Group Şampiyonlar Ligi Şampiyonu VakıfBank Voleybol Takımı’nı ülkemizi gururlandıran bu önemli başarısı nedeniyle tebrik ediyor, final müsabakasının diğer takımı Eczacıbaşı Dynavit’i mücadelesi nedeniyle kutluyorum. 🇹🇷

social.name: Keir Starmer
social.text: RT by @Keir_Starmer: Зустрівся із Прем’єр-міністром Великої Британії Кіром Стармером. Ми в Україні цінуємо всі кроки Великої Британії для підтримки нашого народу та послаблення агресора, зокрема в боротьбі проти російського тіньового флоту. Говорили про це сьогодні з Кіром. Приді

social.name: Israeli PM Office
social.text:
R to @IsraeliPM: As for the drones: A few weeks ago, I ordered the establishment of a special project to thwart the drone threat, and a progress report on the matter will be presented to me today. It will take time, but we are on it.

We will continue to ensure Israel's superiori

social.name: Israeli PM Office
social.text:
R to @IsraeliPM: Over the coming decade, we will add 350 billion NIS to the defense budget to manufacture these munitions here in Israel, ensuring we are not dependent on foreign sources.

Simultaneously, we will develop groundbreaking Israeli-made aircraft. This will change the

social.name: Israeli PM Office
social.text:
R to @IsraeliPM: Our pilots can reach any point in the skies of Iran, and they are prepared to do so if required. We have incredible aircraft and we have incredible pilots.

Regarding independence: I have directed investment into the domestic production capacity of munitions.

social.name: Recep Erdogan
social.text: Hentbol Ardventure Erkekler Süper Lig Şampiyonu Beşiktaş Hentbol Takımı’nı ve taraftarıyla birlikte tüm @Besiktas camiasını en kalbî duygularımla tebrik ediyorum.
